tools.name: memDelete
tools.description: Delete a memory and commit the removal.

tools.name: memGet
tools.description: Fetch a single memory by key. Served from cache when warm.

tools.name: memHistory
tools.description: Return the git commit history for a key, newest first.

tools.name: memList
tools.description: List memory keys, optionally filtered by a key prefix.

prefix.description: key prefix filter; empty lists all

tools.name: memPush
tools.description: Publish local memory commits to the configured git remote. If it reports a non-fast-forward, call memSync then memPush again.

tools.name: memSearch
tools.description: Full-text substring search across keys, values, and tags. Optional limit caps the number of results returned (0 = all).

tools.name: memSet
tools.description: Create or update a memory and commit it to git. Returns the commit revision.

tools.name: memSync
tools.description: Pull from the configured git remote and three-way merge. Returns {conflicts:[{key,base,local,remote}]} — for each conflict the local value was kept; resolve by memSet-ing the chosen value, then memPush.

tools.name: run
tools.description: Code mode: run one Go program that batches many memory operations in a single call. Import "gitmem" and use gitmem.Call(name, args) to invoke any memory tool and gitmem.Return(v) to return a result.

code.description: Go source: package main; import "gitmem"; func main() { ... }

prompts.error: not declared by server; list method returned method not found

resources.error: not declared by server; list method returned method not found

resource_templates.error: not declared by server; list method returned method not found

findings.title: Dynamic outbound URL
findings.description: Dynamic outbound URL detected in the optional browser control panel; the fetch helper receives a same-origin API path.

name: git-mem
coverage_note: The server declares only the MCP tools capability. Its nine tools were enumerated live; prompts and resources are unsupported by this server.
